name: Bókun Tour & Activity API
what_it_does: Bókun REST API for tour and activity management and distribution platform. Enables AI agents to manage product listings, check availability, create bookings, process payments, sync inventory across distribution channels (Viator, GetYourGuide, Airbnb Experiences), and integrate tour operations data with travel platforms. Bókun (Tripadvisor-owned) is a market leader for experience operators.
use_cases: Checking tour availability and pricing from travel discovery agents
Creating and managing bookings from reservation automation agents
Syncing product inventory across OTA channels from distribution management agents
Integrating booking data with CRM and operations systems from travel agent agents
not_for: Hotel room reservations without tour/activity focus
Restaurant reservations without guided experience products
Non-experience travel without tour operator workflows
best_when: A tour operator, activity provider, or travel tech platform wants AI agents to check availability, create bookings, and manage multi-channel distribution through Bókun's experience ecosystem.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer booking data includes personal and payment information. Bókun is Tripadvisor-owned — data governance aligned with Tripadvisor policies.

auth.notes: Bókun uses HMAC-signed API key authentication. Each request must include a timestamp and HMAC signature using the API key and secret. Vendor and reseller channels have separate credential sets.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan available; API access on all plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro and Pro+ plans per-product per-month; distribution channel fees vary
pricing.notes: Icelandic company, Tripadvisor-owned since 2018. Market leader for experience operator management. HMAC authentication adds complexity but improves security.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer booking data — PCI-DSS for payments; GDPR for EU customers
No public MCP server — REST API with HMAC-signed authentication
HMAC signing complexity: each request requires timestamp + HMAC-SHA256 signature
Icelandic company, Tripadvisor-owned — EU data residency with Tripadvisor data policies
Vendor and reseller API channels have different credential sets and capabilities
Availability sessions expire — cache timing must be respected for booking flow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer booking and payment data. GDPR, PCI-DSS. Icelandic/EU origin, Tripadvisor-owned. HMAC-signed API keys for improved security.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer booking data. GDPR, PCI-DSS. HMAC-signed API keys. Tripadvisor-owned EU origin.
